title: Artifacts And More
description: A small mod with some unique artifacts that grants abilities, a rat mob and a structure. Great for people who want some more content to the game without destroying the whole essence of it.
body:
Dungeon: A structure where you can find items like diamonds, gold, iron, and special artifacts. It also spawns a Rat, a hostile mob found inside the dungeon.

Lightning Artifact: Grants a potion effect called “Volt Surge,” increasing attack speed.

Sun Artifact: Shoots magma in the direction you’re looking.

Cloud Artifact: Pushes you in the direction you’re looking for better movement.

Abyss Guard: Summons a damaging beam, but it costs one heart of health.

Crimson Resin Ore: Found in the Nether’s crimson forests. Combine it with a netherite ingot and iron casing to create a "crimsonized netherite casing." Combine it with an artifact to buff it.

Bloodstone: Found in the new Japanese temple. If you hit certain mobs with it, you form a "blood oath" and gain their abilities:

Blaze: Infinite fire resistance, speed II in the Nether.

Bogged: Poison effect on hit, immune to poison, 8 hearts max.

Piglin Brute: Strength II when wearing gold armor or holding a gold ingot.

Creeper: Explodes with a short charge, no cooldown, but takes health to explode.

Spider: Creates a spider web around you.

Other Structures:

Japanese Temple: Found in the cherry blossom biome.

Ruin Structure: Found in plains biomes.
